title: Provider failover and Telegram reporting audit
objective:
Run script:
"""
report = Path('governance/reports/bem534_provider_failover_telegram_audit.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proof = Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem534_provider_telegram_audit.txt')
proof.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
roadmap = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM534_PROVIDER_FAILOVER_TELEGRAM_REPORTING_ROADMAP.md')
roadmap.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

scan_roots = ['governance', '.github/workflows']
files = []
for root in scan_roots:
    p = Path(root)
    if p.exists():
        for f in p.rglob('*'):
            if f.is_file():
                files.append(f)

terms = ['provider','adapter','failover','fallback','reserve','backup','claude','gpt','telegram','hourly','1 hour','one hour','3600','cron','schedule','workflow_dispatch','role-orchestrator','provider-adapter','contour_status']
hits = []
for f in sorted(files, key=lambda x: str(x)):
    try:
        txt = f.read_text(errors='ignore')
    except Exception:
        txt = ''
    low = txt.lower()
    found = []
    for term in terms:
        if term in low or term in str(f).lower():
            found.append(term)
    if found:
        hits.append({'file':str(f), 'terms':found, 'bytes':len(txt)})

# Specific workflow checks.
workflow_checks = []
for wf_name in ['.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml', '.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml', '.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml']:
    wf = Path(wf_name)
    txt = wf.read_text(errors='ignore') if wf.exists() else ''
    low = txt.lower()
    workflow_checks.append({
      'file': wf_name,
      'exists': wf.exists(),
      'workflow_dispatch': 'workflow_dispatch' in low,
      'schedule_trigger': 'schedule:' in low,
      'claude_present': 'claude' in low,
      'gpt_present': 'gpt' in low,
      'failover_present': 'failover' in low or 'fallback' in low or 'reserve' in low or 'backup' in low,
      'telegram_present': 'telegram' in low,
      'hourly_present': 'hourly' in low or '3600' in low or '1 hour' in low or 'one hour' in low
    })

provider_adapter = Path('.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml')
provider_text = provider_adapter.read_text(errors='ignore') if provider_adapter.exists() else ''
provider_low = provider_text.lower()
main_backup_configured = ('claude' in provider_low and 'gpt' in provider_low and ('failover' in provider_low or 'fallback' in provider_low or 'reserve' in provider_low or 'backup' in provider_low))
telegram_hourly_configured = False
for h in hits:
    joined = ','.join(h['terms'])
    if 'telegram' in joined and ('hourly' in joined or '3600' in joined or 'schedule' in joined):
        telegram_hourly_configured = True

# schedule is globally prohibited by contract, so hourly delivery cannot rely on GitHub schedule.
schedule_hits = []
for chk in workflow_checks:
    if chk['schedule_trigger']:
        schedule_hits.append(chk['file'])

status = 'PARTIAL'
findings = []
if main_backup_configured:
    findings.append('Provider adapter appears to include main/reserve failover terms.')
else:
    findings.append('No proven main Claude -> reserve GPT failover policy found in provider-adapter.yml.')
if telegram_hourly_configured:
    findings.append('Telegram hourly reporting terms found, but must be validated against no-schedule policy.')
else:
    findings.append('No proven Telegram hourly canonical report delivery found in active files.')
if schedule_hits:
    findings.append('Schedule triggers found and must be removed: ' + ', '.join(schedule_hits))
else:
    findings.append('No schedule triggers found in inspected workflows; hourly reporting must use an external/manual/runtime mechanism, not GitHub schedule.')

roadmap.write_text('# BEM-534 | Provider Failover + Telegram Reporting Roadmap\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:59 (UTC+3)\n\n## Цель\nПроверить и доработать основной/резервный контуры provider failover и Telegram reporting по канону.\n\n## Этапы\n\n### BEM-534.1 — Provider failover contract\nФормализовать primary Claude contour и reserve GPT contour: состояние лимитов, критерий переключения, запись решения curator/provider-adapter в transport/state.\nPASS: protocol, samples, state fields, no secrets.\n\n### BEM-534.2 — Provider adapter failover implementation\nДоработать provider-adapter.yml или file-based adapter protocol так, чтобы при Claude unavailable/limit_exceeded route переходил на GPT reserve contour.\nPASS: synthetic test Claude unavailable -> GPT reserve selected.\n\n### BEM-534.3 — Main/reserve contour E2E\nПровести synthetic E2E: primary available, primary limit exceeded, reserve selected, final result recorded.\nPASS: transport records, role state, report, blocker=null.\n\n### BEM-534.4 — Telegram canonical report delivery contract\nФормализовать отправку канонического отчёта в Telegram. Важно: schedule triggers запрещены, поэтому hourly delivery нельзя делать через GitHub schedule. Нужно определить разрешённый источник часового тика: Deno runtime/timer, external uptime monitor, manual operator trigger или другой явно разрешённый механизм.\nPASS: protocol and no secret storage.\n\n### BEM-534.5 — Telegram reporting synthetic test\nПровести synthetic test генерации canonical report payload для Telegram без live secret.\nPASS: sample payload, transport record, no secret in files, blocker=null.\n')

hit_lines = []
for h in hits[:120]:
    hit_lines.append('- ' + h['file'] + ': terms=' + ','.join(h['terms']) + ', bytes=' + str(h['bytes']))

report.write_text('# BEM-534 | Provider Failover and Telegram Reporting Audit\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 12:59 (UTC+3)\n\n## Ответ на вопросы оператора\n\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| Основной/резервный контуры | Я знаю архитектурное требование: основной Claude contour и резервный GPT contour должны существовать как provider failover policy | Это следует из вопроса оператора и роли provider-adapter, но текущий аудит не подтвердил полноценную реализацию failover |\n| Проверка main/reserve | До этого я не проводил отдельный E2E main/reserve failover test | В BEM-531/BEM-533 проверялись role contour и Telegram synthetic curator branch, не provider limit failover |\n| Текущее состояние failover | ' + ('Похоже сконфигурирован' if main_backup_configured else 'Не доказано/не подтверждено как рабочее') + ' | provider-adapter audit needs BEM-534.1-BEM-534.3 |\n| Telegram hourly canonical report | ' + ('Найдены признаки, требуется валидация' if telegram_hourly_configured else 'Не доказано, что настроена отправка отчёта по канону раз в час') + ' | Активный запрет schedule triggers означает, что hourly не должен делаться через GitHub schedule |\n| Следствие | Нужна отдельная roadmap BEM-534 | Создана `governance/tasks/pending/BEM534_PROVIDER_FAILOVER_TELEGRAM_REPORTING_ROADMAP.md` |\n\n## Workflow checks\n```json\n' + json.dumps(workflow_checks, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Findings\n' + '\n'.join(['- ' + x for x in findings]) + '\n\n## Relevant file hits\n' + ('\n'.join(hit_lines) if hit_lines else 'none') + '\n\n## Blocker\nНе blocker для аудита. Но полноценный PASS по provider failover и Telegram hourly-reporting не заявлен до выполнения BEM-534.\n')

proof.write_text('BEM-534 audit completed. provider_failover_confirmed=' + str(main_backup_configured) + '. telegram_hourly_confirmed=' + str(telegram_hourly_configured) + '. schedule_hits=' + str(schedule_hits) + '\n')
changed_files.extend([str(report), str(roadmap), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('audited provider main/reserve failover and Telegram canonical reporting; created BEM-534 roadmap')
"""
No issue comments.
